title: convolvulus rottlerianus var. tenella
intro: Convolvulus rottlerianus var. tenella is a plant species, also known as dwarf morning glory, which is a variety of the Convolvulus rottlerianus plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus rottlerianus var. tenella include the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, bronchitis, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further research.
